name: Pheromonal Flourish
outcome: [AttackerName] pivots her body slightly to the side with a heel-clicking step, smiling sweetly as she uses a hand to glamourously toss her hair to the side while temptingly jutting out her shapely derriere, the flourishing motions flooding [TargetName]'s senses with her intoxicating, head-spinning perfumed scent.
miss: [AttackerName] pivots her body slightly to the side with a heel-clicking step, smiling sweetly as she uses a hand to glamourously toss her hair to the side while temptingly jutting out her shapely derriere, but [TargetName] manages to look away!
statusOutcome: [TargetName] shivers with lust as the succubus' aphrodisiac-laden fragrance fills him with flushing arousal, tempting him to keep vacantly staring at the gorgeous demon woman and continue enjoying her sexy show.
